Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-13 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two distinctly different momentum stories. AXTI dominates the rankings at #1 with a composite score of 94.6, driven by extraordinary long-term returns (5,173% over one year) and exceptional consistency across all timeframes—it clears all four SMA gates and maintains a near-perfect 0.88 momentum signal with minimal volatility concerns. In sharp contrast, PARR ranks second with more modest but still substantial gains (362% annually), though it shows a critical weakness: a bad_spy_score of 5.2474, meaning it tends to underperform during market downturns when SPY declines, which significantly reduces its resilience rating compared to AXTI's near-zero negative correlation to bad market days. Both tickers pass all ratio consistency checks and trade above their 200-day moving averages, but AXTI's outperformance versus SPY (5,147% vs 362%) and its superior bad-day resilience make it the stronger short-term momentum candidate by the dashboard's scoring methodology. The data suggests AXTI has built more durable momentum through multiple market cycles, while PARR's gains appear more vulnerable to broad market weakness.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
